case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARCO ANTONIO OROZCO SABALSA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: OSCAR GARCIA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESSIVE FINANCIAL INC.)
